name: Stormfeather
description:
Activate (1 Action) Interact

Requirements You're an expert in Acrobatics.

Even while affixed, this electric blue feather sways lightly in the air, as if always accompanied by a breeze. When activated, the talisman casts fly on you, though the duration is 1 minute. You can Dismiss this activation. If you do, you're affected by Gentle Landing.
